{
  "analysis": "The output didn't show any existing formulas with sheet references. Let me directly test the different syntaxes by writing them to the file and then recalculating.",
  "plan": "I'll update the INDEX-MATCH formulas to use the correct sheet reference syntax. Based on LibreOffice conventions, I'll try using 'Data'.$A$2:$A$201 or similar syntax. I'll update all the expression data formulas and then recalculate.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

wb = load_workbook('protein_expression.xlsx')
ws_task = wb['Task']

print("=== Updating INDEX-MATCH formulas with correct sheet reference ===")

for task_row in range(11, 21):  # Rows 11-20 (proteins)
    for task_col in range(3, 13):  # Columns C-L (samples)
        col_letter = get_column_letter(task_col)
        
        # Use 'Data'.range syntax
        formula = f'=IFERROR(INDEX('Data'.$A$2:$AZ$201,MATCH($A{task_row},'Data'.$A$2:$A$201,0),MATCH({col_letter}$10,'Data'.$1:$1,0)),"")'
        ws_task.cell(task_row, task_col).value = formula
        
print("Sample updated formula for C11:")
print(ws_task.cell(11, 3).value)

wb.save('protein_expression.xlsx')
print("\n=== File saved ===")

EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
